metadata.name: agent_policy_engine
metadata.description: Agentic Policy Engine on Solana, on-chain policy enforcement for AI agent wallets

accounts.name: payer
docs: Receives the rent refund.

accounts.name: vault_input_token_account
docs: Vault's input token account (will be debited by the DEX).
Anchor verifies this token account is owned by the vault PDA.

accounts.name: vault_output_token_account
docs: Vault's output token account (will be credited by the DEX).
Anchor verifies this token account is owned by the vault PDA.

accounts.name: vault_input_token_account
docs: Vault's input token account (will be debited by the DEX).

accounts.name: vault_output_token_account
docs: Vault's output token account (will be credited by the DEX).

accounts.name: vault_source_ata
docs: Vault's source token account (debited by transfer).

accounts.name: vault_source_ata
docs: Vault's source token account (debited by transfer).

errors.name: VaultFrozen
errors.msg: Vault is frozen - all agent operations are blocked

errors.name: SessionKeyRevoked
errors.msg: Session key has been revoked

errors.name: SessionKeyNonceMismatch
errors.msg: Session key nonce does not match vault global nonce - key invalidated

errors.name: SessionKeyAgentMismatch
errors.msg: Session key signer does not match the agent on the key

errors.name: SessionKeyNotYetValid
errors.msg: Session key is not yet valid (valid_after is in the future)

errors.name: SessionKeyExpired
errors.msg: Session key has expired (valid_until has passed)

errors.name: OutsideOperatingHours
errors.msg: Operation attempted outside allowed operating hours

errors.name: CooldownActive
errors.msg: Vault is in cooldown period after a large transaction

errors.name: AddressBlacklisted
errors.msg: Target address is blacklisted - operation permanently denied

errors.name: ProgramNotGreenlisted
errors.msg: Target program is not on the greenlist

errors.name: TokenNotGreenlisted
errors.msg: Token mint is not on the greenlist

errors.name: RecipientNotWhitelisted
errors.msg: Recipient is not on the whitelist

errors.name: RecipientRequiresCosign
errors.msg: Recipient is not whitelisted and require_cosign_new_recipient is enabled - use cosigned

errors.name: PerTxLimitExceeded
errors.msg: USDC amount exceeds per-transaction limit

errors.name: DailyLimitExceeded
errors.msg: USDC amount would exceed daily spending limit

errors.name: SessionLimitExceeded
errors.msg: USDC amount would exceed session key spending limit

errors.name: Tier2ThresholdExceeded
errors.msg: USDC amount exceeds Tier 2 threshold - owner co-sign required

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow in spending calculation

errors.name: InvalidDayEpoch
errors.msg: Provided day_epoch does not match the current UTC day

errors.name: TrackerDayMismatch
errors.msg: Spending tracker day_epoch does not match current day

errors.name: TrackerNotExpired
errors.msg: Spending tracker has not expired yet — cannot close

errors.name: InvalidSessionKeyWindow
errors.msg: Session key valid_until must be after valid_after

errors.name: InvalidSessionKeySpendingLimit
errors.msg: Session key spending limit must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidOperatingHoursStart
errors.msg: Operating hours start must be less than 86400

errors.name: InvalidOperatingHoursEnd
errors.msg: Operating hours end must be less than 86400

errors.name: UsdcAmountMismatch
errors.msg: Declared USDC amount does not match actual Token Program transfer amount

errors.name: InsufficientRemainingAccounts
errors.msg: Insufficient remaining accounts for policy checks

errors.name: TokenInstructionNotAllowed
errors.msg: Only Transfer and TransferChecked are allowed for Token Programs

errors.name: TokenMintRequired
errors.msg: token_mint is required when target is a Token Program

errors.name: UsdcSpentExceedsDeclared
errors.msg: Actual USDC spent exceeds declared usdc_amount

errors.name: UseExecuteActionForTokenTransfers
errors.msg: Use execute_action for direct Token Program transfers, not swap

errors.name: SystemProgramNotAllowedInSwap
errors.msg: System Program cannot be targeted by swap instruction

errors.name: TokenAccountAuthorityChanged
errors.msg: Token account authority changed during CPI — possible authority theft

errors.name: OutputBelowMinimum
errors.msg: Swap output amount is below declared minimum

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccount
errors.msg: Token account data is too short or malformed

errors.name: InputMintMismatch
errors.msg: Input token account mint does not match declared input_mint

errors.name: OutputMintMismatch
errors.msg: Output token account mint does not match declared output_mint

errors.name: RecipientNotAllowed
errors.msg: Recipient is not allowed by any policy or whitelist entry

errors.name: RecipientPerTxLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Per-recipient per-transaction USDC limit exceeded

errors.name: RecipientDailyLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Per-recipient daily USDC limit exceeded

errors.name: SwapPairNotAllowed
errors.msg: Swap pair is not allowed — no SwapPairPolicy exists for this mint pair

errors.name: InvalidSwapPairOrder
errors.msg: Swap pair mints must be passed in canonical order (mint_a < mint_b by bytes)

errors.name: InvalidRecipientPolicyData
errors.msg: RecipientPolicy account data is too short or malformed

errors.name: InvalidRecipientPolicyMode
errors.msg: Invalid recipient policy mode (must be 0=allow or 1=cosign_required)

errors.name: RecipientPolicyCosignRequired
errors.msg: Recipient policy requires owner co-sign for this recipient

errors.name: RecipientMismatch
errors.msg: CPI destination account owner does not match declared recipient

errors.name: TokenMintMismatch
errors.msg: CPI source account mint does not match declared token_mint

errors.name: InvalidTokenProgram
errors.msg: Invalid token program: must be SPL Token or Token-2022

errors.name: SourceMintMismatch
errors.msg: Source token account mint does not match token_mint

errors.name: DestinationMintMismatch
errors.msg: Destination token account mint does not match token_mint

errors.name: DestinationOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Destination token account owner does not match recipient

errors.name: TypedTransferRequired
errors.msg: Token Program transfers must use execute_action_transfer when require_typed_transfers is enabled

errors.name: ProgramIsSwapOnly
errors.msg: This program is marked swap_only — use execute_action_swap

errors.name: SystemProgramNotAllowed
errors.msg: System Program cannot be targeted via execute_action — use owner withdraw_sol

types.name: BlacklistEntry
docs: Denied address, overrides all other checks.
PDA existence = membership in the blacklist.

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault this entry belongs to.

fields.name: address
docs: Denied address.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: GreenlistEntry
docs: Token mint or program address the agent is allowed to interact with.
PDA existence = membership in the greenlist.

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault this entry belongs to.

fields.name: pubkey
docs: Token mint address or program address.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

fields.name: swap_only
docs: If true, this program can only be called via execute_action_swap, not execute_action.

types.name: RecipientPolicy
docs: Per-recipient spending policy with limits and mode control.
Seeds: [b"recipient_policy", vault, recipient]
One PDA per recipient per vault.
Daily accounting is embedded (like SessionKey.amount_spent_usdc).
When `daily_limit_usdc = 0`, the account is read-only (no write-back needed).

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault this policy belongs to.

fields.name: recipient
docs: The recipient address this policy governs.

fields.name: per_tx_limit_usdc
docs: Max USDC per single transaction to this recipient (0 = use vault default).

fields.name: daily_limit_usdc
docs: Max USDC per day to this recipient (0 = no per-recipient daily limit).

fields.name: total_spent_today
docs: USDC spent to this recipient today (auto-resets when day_epoch changes).

fields.name: day_epoch
docs: Which UTC day the total_spent_today counter belongs to.

fields.name: mode
docs: 0 = allow (autonomous), 1 = cosign_required (owner must co-sign).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: SessionKey
docs: Time-bound, spending-limited permission for an agent to operate the vault.

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault this session key belongs to.

fields.name: agent
docs: The agent keypair that can use this session key.

fields.name: nonce
docs: Must match vault.global_session_nonce,  mismatch = invalidated.

fields.name: valid_after
docs: Unix timestamp after which the key is valid.

fields.name: valid_until
docs: Unix timestamp after which the key expires.

fields.name: spending_limit_usdc
docs: Maximum USDC this session key is allowed to spend.

fields.name: amount_spent_usdc
docs: USDC spent so far using this session key.

fields.name: is_revoked
docs: Individually revoked by owner.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: SpendingTracker
docs: Daily USDC spending tracker. One PDA per vault per day.
Created via `init_tracker`, closed via `close_spent_tracker` to reclaim rent.

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault this tracker belongs to.

fields.name: day_epoch
docs: Day identifier: unix_timestamp / 86400.

fields.name: total_spent_usdc
docs: Total USDC spent on this day.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: SwapPairPolicy
docs: Pair-level swap restriction. When `VaultConfig.swap_require_pair_policy` is
true, `execute_action_swap` requires a SwapPairPolicy PDA to exist for the
(input_mint, output_mint) pair.
Seeds: [b"swap_pair", vault, min(mint_a, mint_b), max(mint_a, mint_b)]
Mints are canonically sorted by bytes so USDC/SOL and SOL/USDC resolve to
the same PDA.

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault this policy belongs to.

fields.name: mint_a
docs: Canonically sorted smaller mint.

fields.name: mint_b
docs: Canonically sorted larger mint.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: Vault
docs: Central vault account, multiple per owner (distinguished by vault_index).
Controls frozen state, session nonce, and identifies the USDC mint.

fields.name: owner
docs: The owner who controls this vault (immutable after creation).

fields.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint address for this network (devnet or mainnet).

fields.name: vault_index
docs: Owner-chosen index for multi-vault support (used in PDA seeds).

fields.name: global_session_nonce
docs: Increment to invalidate all active session keys at once.

fields.name: is_frozen
docs: When true, all agent operations are blocked.

fields.name: session_counter
docs: Monotonic counter for session key creation (used in PDA seeds).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: VaultConfig
docs: Vault configuration, spending limits, time controls, tier settings.
Separate from Vault so updates don't require realloc on the main account.

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault this config belongs to.

fields.name: per_tx_limit_usdc
docs: Max USDC per single transaction (0 = no limit). 6 decimals.

fields.name: daily_limit_usdc
docs: Max USDC per 24h window (0 = no limit). 6 decimals.

fields.name: operating_hours_start
docs: Seconds from midnight UTC when operations begin (u32::MAX = disabled).

fields.name: operating_hours_end
docs: Seconds from midnight UTC when operations end (u32::MAX = disabled).

fields.name: cooldown_seconds
docs: Forced wait in seconds after a large transaction (0 = disabled).

fields.name: cooldown_threshold_usdc
docs: USDC threshold that triggers the cooldown (0 = disabled).

fields.name: last_cooldown_trigger
docs: Unix timestamp of when cooldown was last triggered.

fields.name: tier2_threshold_usdc
docs: USDC amount above which owner co-sign is required (0 = all Tier 1).

fields.name: require_cosign_new_recipient
docs: If true, transfers to non-whitelisted addresses require owner co-sign.

fields.name: swap_require_pair_policy
docs: If true, execute_action_swap requires a SwapPairPolicy PDA for the mint pair.

fields.name: require_typed_transfers
docs: If true, execute_action/cosigned rejects Token Program targets — must use execute_action_transfer.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

types.name: WhitelistEntry
docs: Approved recipient address.
PDA existence = membership in the whitelist.

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault this entry belongs to.

fields.name: address
docs: Approved recipient address.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.
